channel.title: plasma on sainnhe's blog
channel.description: Recent content in plasma on sainnhe's blog

item.title: Blur Any Window in KDE Plasma
item.description: About The newest KDE plasma natively support blur, but it has many limitations, for example I can’t blur vim status line and firefox. This article tries to find a way to blur any window in plasma, like this: Note: There is a much more elegant method to achieve this, see the comment for more information. Preparation To begin with, make sure you have already enabled blur effect via Kvantum and some themes that support blur, for example Sweet
